title: FRAXINUS Fly Zapper Electric, Mosquito Killer Lamp, Electronic Bug Catcher, 4200V High Powered Grids, 20W UV light Trap Flying Insects, wasps, and Moths, Quiet Pest Control for Indoor, Home Use.
bullet_points: POWERFUL & LARGE AREA COVERAGE: This Insect killer has an extremely powerful 4200V high voltage metal grid, instantly killing flying insects once they contact the grid. Effective for a large area of up to 1,000 sq. feet! Ideal for home, office, kitchens, restaurants, schools, hospitals, etc. or for commercial and industrial use.

EFFECTIVE FLY & BUG CONTROL: This Fly Zapper features two high intensity 10 watt ultraviolet bulbs that attracts flies, mosquitoes and all pesky flying insects into the device, then get immediately zapped by its powerful killing grid. Protects and prevents against annoying and disease carrying insects and flies!

ULTRA SAFE TO USE: Compared to other insect killers, our insect killer has a 360˚ full surrounded mesh screen which can protect you from any accidental contacts. Fire resistant and solid ABS shell, much safer than others. A detachable chain for wall hanging to keep out-of-reach of children and pets, or can be free standing.

CHEMICAL FREE& ODOR FREE: Without use of dangerous poisons, pesticides sprays or chemicals. Our fly zapper is 100% chemical and odor free, especially safe for pregnant women, children and pets. And it is UKCA, CE certified and RoHS compliant.

COMPACT & QUIET: This bug zapper is very compact, lightweight, fits perfectly in your home. By using advanced technology, the noise has been reduced by 50%. During operation, it is not noisy at all, and you only hear quite "crack" sounds when zaps.

EASE TO USE: Simply plug in and watch our mosquito kiiller eliminate all pesky and annoying insects. Dead insects get collected at the tray, which can be easily removed for cleaning and disposal. A small brush is included and our cable was upgraded to 1.5 meters, longer than others (other products only have 1 meter cable). No extension cable needed.
description: FRAXINUS is a company focusing on design and manufacture high quality and efficient products for your sweet home, keeps your family and pets safe from pesticides, attractants and sprays. Our Insect Killer equipped with advanced technology, uses physical methods (powerful UV lights & electric grid) to attact and eliminate flying insects.</br> Great for home,bedroom, kitchen,Living room, office, restaurants, schools, warehouse, etc.</br> </br> WHY CHOOSE FRAXINUS INSECT KILLER?</br> >EFFICIENT 20W ULTRAVIOLET LIGHT ATTRACTION</br> This Fly Killer features two high intensity 10 watt ultraviolet bulbs which emits 365 nm wavelength that has been highly attractive to flies, mosquitoes and any other flying insects.</br> </br> >POWERFUL HIGH VOLTAGE INTERNAL GRID</br> This Fly Zapper has a 4000V powerful high-voltage internal grid. The flies, mosquitoes, moths, or other flying insects will be electrocuted instantly as soon as they touch the powerful grid.</br> </br> >CHEMICAL FREE, ULTRA SAFE for HOME USE</br> 100% physical way to kill flies, mosquitoes and all other flying insects. No need to use chemicals, totally non-toxic, odorless, and radiation-free. Especially suitable for babies and pregnant women.</br></br> >MAINTENANCE FREE & CONVENIENT TO USE.</br> For indoor use, or outdoors where unit will stay dry. Stands on its own or can be hung onto the wall with a chain Hanger (included). insects are collected in a removable and washable tray.</br></br> LARGE AREA PROTECTION</br> The coverage area for this 20w high-powered electric insect killer up to impressive 1000-1500 sq. ft.</br> 4000V grid provided reliable and effective home / office / kitchens / restaurants / schools / hospitals flying insect control.</br></br> HOW TO REPLACE THE BULBS</br> Step 1. Switch off the power button, unplug the insect killer.</br> Step 2.Use a screwdriver with an insulated handle to discharge the inner high-voltage grid for 3-5 seconds.</br> Step 3.Unscrew and open the back side of the protection frame.</br> Step 4. Gently rotate the bulb and take the bulb out. Then put into the new bulb, rotate the bulb 90 degree to ensure that it snaps tightly into the bulb holder.</br></br>
